note: Canonical, NEO-root-RELATIVE in-tree homes for NEO evidence artifacts. Homes/locations only; field-level schemas are deferred to 4.0 Session-0. All paths resolve against the PORT-S1 self-locating NEO root ('./' = the resolved root). ZERO absolute paths by contract. Open/extensible list: consumers must tolerate added categories and added section-5.5 artifacts.
path_convention: root-relative; './' denotes the PORT-S1-resolved NEO root; no drive letters; no host-store absolutes

program_docs.note: Roadmap master, program spec, and program-level section-5.5 evidence. Reserved name; no file moved by A-BRIDGE.

audit_bundles.note: Isolated-auditor evidence; sibling to proof/ (builder proof).

release_authenticity.note: In-tree anchor/manifest prove only 'unchanged since packaging'. Authenticity rides the out-of-band published root SHA; verify FAILS CLOSED for others-install when it is absent (v4 fix #1 / T1). PORT-S2 RE-CUTS fresh into ./.neo/release/; it does not copy the stale provisional-dev anchor. Custody: provisional-dev is tamper-evident, not tamper-proof.

deferred_to_session_0: full field-level JSON schemas for section-5.5 files
